methodology.verification: adversarial majority vote; critical/high/medium only confirmed

pr_reviews_summary.title: perf: bound service maintenance memory and redundant work
fix(mcp): use object roots for structured outputs
pr_reviews_summary.residual_note: manage_project_alias list array-root remains as MCP-001

pr_reviews_summary.title: fix(audit): consolidated 2026-07-17 audit closeout + R1–R3 follow-ups
fix(audit): R4 insight embed terminalization, R5 reclaim budget cursor, R10/R11
pre_submit_fixes: Only explicit input-local provider rejection consumes the insight permanent-failure budget
HTTP/transport, malformed response, dimension/config, and cancellation failures propagate and remain recoverable
R1 followups status corrected to open (partially mitigated)

runtime_evidence.surface: real EngramService + EngramMCP with isolated temporary database and fake OpenAI-compatible endpoint
runtime_evidence.http_500: Three failures wrote no insight_embedding_failures row; healthy restart embedded and retrieved the same insight
runtime_evidence.dimension_mismatch: Three 2D-vs-configured-3D failures wrote no insight_embedding_failures row; healthy restart embedded and retrieved the same insight
runtime_evidence.input_rejection: Explicit param=input HTTP 400 reached retry_count=3 and failed_permanent; healthy restart did not resend full content

pr_reviews_summary.submit_gate: Fresh Codex PASS required before commit or push

pr_reviews_summary.note: Do not double-count defects against stack PRs

findings.title: Triple independent Read SQL stacks (R1 residual)
findings.impact: Same query can return different session sets/counts across App online, App offline, MCP, and service IPC
findings.root_cause: Three read owners without shared query layer; CoreRead is connection-only
findings.fix: Move list/search/cost predicates into EngramCoreRead; cross-surface id-set parity suite

findings.title: MCP multi-term keyword FTS is row-level MATCH, not session-scoped AND
findings.impact: Agents using MCP search get lower multi-term recall than app/service on multi-row FTS sessions
findings.root_cause: R1 residual; H2 only ported CJK/short LIKE
findings.fix: Port CTE-per-term session-scoped AND or share one builder

findings.title: Search since predicate diverges (COALESCE end/start vs start_time only)
findings.impact: Long-running sessions visible in app/service search missing from MCP keyword/semantic with same since
findings.root_cause: MCP search filters never aligned with appendSearchFilters
findings.fix: Share since predicate; MCP use COALESCE(end_time, start_time)

findings.title: Reclamation drops product-missing bindings without advancing cursor
findings.impact: Full page of product-missing dual-receipt bindings can stall reclaim forever; later eligibles starve
findings.root_cause: Cursor fairness only tracks returned decisions; silent compactMap drops invisible
findings.fix: Treat product-missing as examined blocked; add full-page missing repro
fix_evidence: ArchiveReclamationCoordinator distinguishes missing_product_session from invalid_product_activity instead of compactMap-dropping either candidate
Policy preflight preserves disabled, invalid-hot-window, and unsupported-source blocker precedence before product-state diagnostics
Three ArchiveReclamationCoordinatorTests _repro cases captured RED and then GREEN
A full 1000-row missing page advances the cursor without intent/source deletion; the following eligible binding reclaims next cycle

findings.title: Skip-tier artifact purge never deletes semantic_chunks
findings.impact: Orphan chunk BLOBs forever; tools/list may advertise semantic/hybrid on skip-only corpus
findings.root_cause: Cleanup written for legacy session_embeddings only
findings.fix: DELETE semantic_chunks on skip purge; probe requires searchable-tier session
fix_evidence: Direct snapshot downgrades and startup per-session, batch, and reconciliation paths delete skip-tier semantic_chunks while preserving non-subagent controls; nullable-tier subagents are first classified as skip
semantic_chunks is a cheap startup reconciliation signal even after the one-time FTS sweep marker has completed
SessionVectorSearchAvailability requires a compatible chunk owned by a searchable-tier session via the shared semantic tier predicate
Five selected _repro tests initially captured 6 behavioral failures; the Codex-requested nullable-tier expansion captured 2 more failures before all passed

EngramCoreTests reported 930 passed and 1 skipped out of 931 total; EngramServiceCore reported 571 passed and 1 skipped out of 572 total; EngramMCPTests passed 157 of 157; the Debug Engram build succeeded

findings.title: Periodic embedding starves when scan.indexed is merge-only zero
findings.impact: Idle hosts with pending/retry embed jobs never drain until a session merge or restart
findings.root_cause: Idle-skip gate interacted with merge-only indexed metric from PR 183
findings.fix: Decouple embed eligibility from merge count; pending-job signal or idle N-cycle drain
findings.verify_note: Verified keep on current HEAD by PR review adversarial verify

findings.title: Startup long maintenance write names miss isLongRunningWriteCommand
findings.impact: Short writes behind healthy multi-second startup drain get false writerBusy (M1 residual)
findings.root_cause: Brittle name allowlist drifted from performWriteCommand call sites
findings.fix: Classify the three missed startup names; add exact-name classification and queue-behavior tests
fix_evidence: initialInstructionBackfill, initialImplementationBeatBackfill, and initialFtsDrain now use the long-running writer queue policy
Classification and follower-behind-initialFtsDrain behavioral _repro tests captured RED and then GREEN
All 20 ServiceWriterGateTests passed; EngramServiceCore reported 571 passed and 1 skipped out of 572 total
The Debug Engram app build succeeded

findings.title: Advanced Session Filter settings are dead controls
findings.impact: Users flip noiseFilter/hide* with no list effect; false control over core visibility
findings.root_cause: Settings keys orphaned after AppStorage + SessionVisibilityFilter cutover
findings.fix: Wire shared list predicate or remove/relabel controls

findings.title: Offload trusts remote HEAD then collapses local FTS without durability proof
findings.impact: False HEAD 200 can leave cold sessions on shadow-only FTS without proven remote blob (opt-in path)
findings.root_cause: HEAD used as authority for commitOffloaded; comment requires PUT success
findings.fix: Always PUT or GET+hash-verify before commitOffloaded

findings.title: Project filter exact on app/service, substring LIKE on MCP
findings.impact: MCP project=app matches my-app/app-v2; MCP tools also disagree with each other
findings.root_cause: No shared project predicate; historical MCP partial match
findings.fix: Default exact match + aliases; substring behind explicit flag

findings.title: manage_project_alias list emits array-root structuredContent
findings.impact: MCP 2025-11-25 object structuredContent clients fail on list; inconsistent with add/remove
findings.root_cause: PR 186 only fixed tools with outputSchema
findings.fix: Wrap as {aliases:[...]}, declare schema, extend object-root tests

findings.title: get_context / tool_analytics / file_activity omit full skip+hidden visibility
findings.impact: Skip/subagent noise in agent bootstrap; analytics overcount vs list_sessions defaults

findings.title: AI/Advanced settings can drop last edits and block main thread
findings.impact: Debounced AI edits lost on leave; Advanced sync flock hitch (R9/M21)
findings.root_cause: MainActor file I/O; AI debounce without leave flush; Advanced undebounced
findings.fix: Debounce Advanced; flush onDisappear; off-main I/O

findings.title: Insight embed success and failure records not atomic
findings.impact: Crash or error after writeEmbeddings commits but before recordFailures commits leaves that cycle's failed insights pending; the next eligible backfill may repeat provider calls and delays retry/terminal convergence until failure bookkeeping succeeds. Successfully embedded insights are excluded from reselection.
findings.root_cause: Two sequential writer.write vs session single-tx design

findings.title: npm audit fatal on push, soft on PR
findings.impact: main can go red after green PR on same adm-zip findings
findings.fix: Align PR/push policy or pin/replace transitive deps

findings.title: Recovery intent loop skips over-budget rows without ordered stop
findings.impact: Non-FIFO recovery under partial budgets; not R5 candidate regression
findings.fix: Optional ordered stop or recovery cursor
findings.label: pre-existing
